note: Illustrative per-passenger emission factors in grams of CO2-equivalent per kilometre. Sourced from typical published transport-mode averages and rounded for guidance; not for regulatory reporting.
tips: Choosing transit or the official shuttle over driving solo is the single biggest way to cut match-day emissions.
Bring an empty reusable bottle and use free refill stations instead of buying single-use plastic.
Use colour-coded recycling and compost bins on every concourse.
Carpooling with three others roughly quarters your per-person travel footprint versus driving alone.
